questionHtml: Sketch a demand and supply diagram to show the impact of an indirect tax on the market for social media applications such as WhatsApp (Text E, paragraph [1]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [1].

For a demand and supply diagram, the vertical axis should be price or P. The horizontal axis should be quantity or Q. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Sketch a demand and supply diagram to show the impact of an indirect tax on the market for social media applications such as WhatsApp (Text E, paragraph [1]).
breadcrumbLabels: 2.7.2 Main forms of government intervention in markets
